name: CLX - MGA Insurance Onboarding Curriculum Seed v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET. Seeds the 30-day insurance advisor onboarding curriculum.

parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.item.json.body || {};
const expected = process.env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET || '';
if (!body.internal_secret || body.internal_secret !== expected) return { json: { _unauthorized: true, status: 401 } };
const days = [
  { day_number: 1,  module_title: 'Welcome + license verification',                 module_description: 'Confirm provincial license is current; upload jurisdiction certificates.',                  estimated_minutes: 30, required_actions: ['Upload current LLQP/HLLQP cert','Confirm jurisdiction'], learning_objectives: ['Understand licensing requirements','Provide all current certifications'] },
  { day_number: 2,  module_title: 'E&O insurance verification',                       module_description: 'Verify Errors & Omissions coverage is active and adequate.',                                estimated_minutes: 20, required_actions: ['Upload E&O policy declaration','Confirm coverage amount'], learning_objectives: ['Understand E&O scope','Verify continuous coverage'] },
  { day_number: 3,  module_title: 'MGA agreement signing',                             module_description: 'Review + sign the Crystallux MGA agreement covering commission splits.',                       estimated_minutes: 45, required_actions: ['Read agreement','Sign via Zoho Sign'], learning_objectives: ['Understand split structure','Understand termination terms'] },
  { day_number: 4,  module_title: 'AML compliance basics',                             module_description: 'FINTRAC obligations + suspicious-transaction reporting.',                                    estimated_minutes: 30 },
  { day_number: 5,  module_title: 'Privacy + PIPEDA training',                         module_description: 'Consent collection, data handling, retention.',                                              estimated_minutes: 30 },
  { day_number: 6,  module_title: 'Replacement disclosure rules',                      module_description: 'FSRA/AMF rules for replacing existing coverage.',                                            estimated_minutes: 30 },
  { day_number: 7,  module_title: 'Suitability documentation',                         module_description: 'What to record + retain so a future regulator can reconstruct your reasoning.',              estimated_minutes: 30 },
  { day_number: 8,  module_title: 'Term life product training',                        module_description: 'Term life products from your top 3 carriers; pricing + riders.',                              estimated_minutes: 45 },
  { day_number: 9,  module_title: 'Whole life product training',                       module_description: 'Whole life, par/non-par, vanishing premium.',                                                estimated_minutes: 45 },
  { day_number: 10, module_title: 'Universal life product training',                   module_description: 'UL mechanics, indexed strategies, side-account.',                                             estimated_minutes: 45 },
  { day_number: 11, module_title: 'Critical illness product training',                 module_description: 'CI definitions, return-of-premium, partial benefits.',                                       estimated_minutes: 45 },
  { day_number: 12, module_title: 'Disability product training',                       module_description: 'Own-occ vs any-occ, waiting + benefit periods.',                                            estimated_minutes: 45 },
  { day_number: 13, module_title: 'Health + travel + group benefits',                  module_description: 'Supplemental health, travel, employer group plans.',                                         estimated_minutes: 30 },
  { day_number: 14, module_title: 'P&C product overview (where licensed)',             module_description: 'Auto + home + commercial; only relevant if dual-licensed.',                                  estimated_minutes: 30, is_mandatory: false },
  { day_number: 15, module_title: 'Discovery conversations',                            module_description: 'How to ask questions that uncover real needs.',                                              estimated_minutes: 45 },
  { day_number: 16, module_title: 'KYC end-to-end',                                     module_description: 'Identity, source of funds, PEP, sanctions, recordkeeping.',                                   estimated_minutes: 45 },
  { day_number: 17, module_title: 'Suitability assessment in practice',                 module_description: 'Walk through a real suitability_assessment from start to finish.',                            estimated_minutes: 45 },
  { day_number: 18, module_title: 'Objection handling',                                 module_description: '5 most common objections + ethical responses.',                                              estimated_minutes: 45 },
  { day_number: 19, module_title: 'Closing techniques',                                 module_description: 'Ethical closing patterns. No fear-tactics.',                                                 estimated_minutes: 45 },
  { day_number: 20, module_title: 'Compliance review process',                          module_description: 'How the Crystallux compliance pipeline reviews your applications.',                          estimated_minutes: 30 },
  { day_number: 21, module_title: 'Practice presentation #1 (recorded)',               module_description: 'Record a 15-minute discovery + needs presentation; supervisor reviews.',                     estimated_minutes: 60, required_actions: ['Record presentation','Submit for review'] },
  { day_number: 22, module_title: 'Application data + paperwork',                       module_description: 'How to complete an application without back-and-forth.',                                     estimated_minutes: 45 },
  { day_number: 23, module_title: 'E-signature + submission',                          module_description: 'Zoho Sign workflow + carrier submission.',                                                   estimated_minutes: 30 },
  { day_number: 24, module_title: 'Underwriting follow-up',                             module_description: 'Working with underwriters when they ask for more info.',                                     estimated_minutes: 45 },
  { day_number: 25, module_title: 'Policy issuance + delivery',                         module_description: 'Receiving the policy, delivery requirements, free-look period.',                              estimated_minutes: 30 },
  { day_number: 26, module_title: 'Post-issuance follow-up',                            module_description: 'How to set up the annual review cadence at policy delivery.',                                estimated_minutes: 30 },
  { day_number: 27, module_title: 'Commission + chargebacks',                           module_description: 'How commissions work, when chargebacks happen.',                                              estimated_minutes: 30 },
  { day_number: 28, module_title: 'Practice presentation #2 (recorded)',               module_description: 'Final recorded presentation for supervisor signoff.',                                        estimated_minutes: 60, required_actions: ['Record presentation','Submit for review'] },
  { day_number: 29, module_title: 'First client preparation',                           module_description: 'Pick your first prospect; review their file with supervisor.',                              estimated_minutes: 45 },
  { day_number: 30, module_title: 'Graduation + supervisor signoff',                    module_description: 'Final supervisor signoff; you are cleared to write business.',                                estimated_minutes: 30, required_actions: ['Final review with supervisor','Supervisor signs off'] }
];
const rows = days.map(function (d) { return Object.assign({ vertical_id: 'insurance', is_active: true }, d); });
return { json: { _authorized: true, rows } };
return { json: { ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', days_seeded: ($('Build Days').first().json.rows || []).length } };
